description.en: Ensure that any flag groups/masks contain only named flags – useful when values are specified instead of being generated by auto(): >>> from enum import Flag, verify, NAMED_FLAGS >>> @verify(NAMED_FLAGS) ... class Color(Flag): ... RED = 1 ... GREEN = 2 ... BLUE = 4 ... WHITE = 15 ... NEON = 31 Traceback (most recent call last): ... ValueError: invalid Flag 'Color': aliases WHITE and NEON are missing combined values of 0x18 [use enum.show_flag_values(value) for details]

description.en: A decorator for use in enums: its target will not become a member. Added in version 3.11.
